header: The design system TYPO3 has been waiting for
subheadline: 244 content elements, 49 Fluid components, and a full theme layer — accessible, token-driven, and beautiful by default. Built once, so you never have to.

feature_items.title: 244 ready-made elements
feature_items.description: Assemble pages from ten curated groups — every layout consistent, no custom templates, no design drift.

feature_items.title: Theming editors control
feature_items.description: Preset, dark mode, density, radius, and fonts live in site settings — a restyle is a dropdown, not a deployment.

feature_items.title: Tailwind v4 pipeline
feature_items.description: OKLCH tokens and container queries compile to lean static CSS — no runtime framework to ship or upgrade.

feature_items.title: Accessible out of the box
feature_items.description: Semantic landmarks, keyboard support, and WCAG 2.2-checked contrast ship with every component you place.

feature_items.title: Editors who love their CMS
feature_items.description: Backend previews, guided forms, and Visual Editor inline editing keep every edit safe, visible, and on-brand.

feature_items.title: Quality you can verify
feature_items.description: PHPStan level max, a 400-test CI, and an 11-category template audit guard every one of the 244 elements.
